title: Clockwork: Time HUDs
description: A minecraft time-related client side only mod which tells the time in real life as well as the in game time!
body:
**Clockwork is a lightweight client-side HUD mod that shows:**
 
-  ✅ In-game time (daytime ticks + label)
-  
-  ✅ Real-life time (local system time)
-  
-  ✅ Animated clock icon (smooth frame-based animation)
-  
-  ✅ Drag & drop HUD positioning (Edit HUD Position menu)
-  
-  ✅ Toggles for in-game time and IRL time
 
**How to use**

Open Clockwork menu (press the comma key [,] The keybind can be changed in controls)

Toggle:

Time in game: ON/OFF

Time in real life: ON/OFF

Click Edit HUD Position and drag the HUDs where you want them.

**Notes**

Client-side only (safe to use on servers).

Works on Minecraft 1.21.11 (Fabric).

More features planned in future updates.

**Credits**

Created by Voltasonic.
